name: changelog
author: JetBrains
description: Maintains IdeaVim changelog (CHANGES.md) and build.gradle.kts changeNotes. Use when updating changelog, documenting releases, or reviewing commits/PRs for changelog entries.
description_zh: 该Claude Skill自动化维护IdeaVim项目的更新日志。它读取git历史、PR和标签，以用户视角更新CHANGES.md和build.gradle.kts中的发布说明。包含格式规则、过滤内部变更和处理历史文档空白的逻辑。

name: doc-sync
author: JetBrains
description: Keeps IdeaVim documentation in sync with code changes. Use this skill when you need to verify documentation accuracy after code changes, or when checking if documentation (in doc/, README.md, CONTRIBUTING.md) matches the current codebase. The skill can work bidirectionally - from docs to code verification, or from code changes to documentation updates.
description_zh: 该技能自动化验证 IdeaVim 文档与实际代码库的一致性。它提供系统化工作流，用于检查文档中的代码示例是否与真实实现匹配，并使用特定 git 命令检测破坏性变更。工具支持双向操作：代码变更后验证文档，或 API 变更时更新文档。
_original_description: This skill automates verification that IdeaVim documentation matches the actual codebase. It provides a systematic workflow for checking code examples in docs against real implementations, with specific git commands to detect breaking changes. The tool works bidirectionally: verifying docs after code changes or updating docs when APIs change.

name: tests-maintenance
author: JetBrains
description: Maintains IdeaVim test suite quality. Reviews disabled tests, ensures Neovim annotations are documented, and improves test readability. Use for periodic test maintenance.
description_zh: 自动化维护IdeaVim测试套件，检查已禁用的测试、更新Neovim排除注解并提升测试可读性。每次运行专注于一个逻辑变更，确保生成清晰可审的拉取请求。提供具体的命令和测试选择策略。

name: baoyu-article-illustrator
author: JimLiu
description: Analyzes article structure, identifies positions requiring visual aids, generates illustrations with Type × Style two-dimension approach. Use when user asks to "illustrate article", "add images", "generate images for article", or "为文章配图".

name: baoyu-comic
author: JimLiu
description: Knowledge comic creator supporting multiple art styles and tones. Creates original educational comics with detailed panel layouts and sequential image generation. Use when user asks to create "知识漫画", "教育漫画", "biography comic", "tutorial comic", or "Logicomix-style comic".

name: baoyu-compress-image
author: JimLiu
description: Compresses images to WebP (default) or PNG with automatic tool selection. Use when user asks to "compress image", "optimize image", "convert to webp", or reduce image file size.

name: baoyu-cover-image
author: JimLiu
description: Generates article cover images with 5 dimensions (type, palette, rendering, text, mood) combining 9 color palettes and 6 rendering styles. Supports cinematic (2.35:1), widescreen (16:9), and square (1:1) aspects. Use when user asks to "generate cover image", "create article cover", or "make cover".
_original_description: Generates article cover images with 4 dimensions (type, style, text, mood) and 20 hand-drawn styles. Supports cinematic (2.35:1), widescreen (16:9), and square (1:1) aspects. Use when user asks to "generate cover image", "create article cover", "make cover", or mentions "封面图".

name: baoyu-danger-gemini-web
author: JimLiu
description: Generates images and text via reverse-engineered Gemini Web API. Supports text generation, image generation from prompts, reference images for vision input, and multi-turn conversations. Use when other skills need image generation backend, or when user requests "generate image with Gemini", "Gemini text generation", or needs vision-capable AI generation.

name: baoyu-danger-x-to-markdown
author: JimLiu
description: Converts X (Twitter) tweets and articles to markdown with YAML front matter. Uses reverse-engineered API requiring user consent. Use when user mentions "X to markdown", "tweet to markdown", "save tweet", or provides x.com/twitter.com URLs for conversion.

name: baoyu-format-markdown
author: JimLiu
description: Formats plain text or markdown files with frontmatter, titles, summaries, headings, bold, lists, and code blocks. Use when user asks to "format markdown", "beautify article", "add formatting", or improve article layout. Outputs to {filename}-formatted.md.

name: baoyu-image-gen
author: JimLiu
description: AI image generation with OpenAI, Google, DashScope and Replicate APIs. Supports text-to-image, reference images, aspect ratios. Sequential by default; parallel generation available on request. Use when user asks to generate, create, or draw images.
_original_description: AI image generation with OpenAI and Google APIs. Supports text-to-image, reference images, aspect ratios, and parallel generation (recommended 4 concurrent subagents). Use when user asks to generate, create, or draw images.

name: baoyu-infographic
author: JimLiu
description: Generates professional infographics with 21 layout types and 20 visual styles. Analyzes content, recommends layout×style combinations, and generates publication-ready infographics. Use when user asks to create "infographic", "信息图", "visual summary", "可视化", or "高密度信息大图".
_original_description: Generates professional infographics with 20 layout types and 17 visual styles. Analyzes content, recommends layout×style combinations, and generates publication-ready infographics. Use when user asks to create "infographic", "信息图", "visual summary", or "可视化".

name: baoyu-markdown-to-html
author: JimLiu
description: Converts Markdown to styled HTML with WeChat-compatible themes. Supports code highlighting, math, PlantUML, footnotes, alerts, and infographics. Use when user asks for "markdown to html", "convert md to html", "md转html", or needs styled HTML output from markdown.

name: baoyu-post-to-wechat
author: JimLiu
description: Posts content to WeChat Official Account (微信公众号) via API or Chrome CDP. Supports article posting (文章) with HTML, markdown, or plain text input, and image-text posting (贴图, formerly 图文) with multiple images. Use when user mentions "发布公众号", "post to wechat", "微信公众号", or "贴图/图文/文章".
_original_description: Posts content to WeChat Official Account (微信公众号) via Chrome CDP automation. Supports article posting (文章) with full markdown formatting and image-text posting (图文) with multiple images. Use when user mentions "发布公众号", "post to wechat", "微信公众号", or "图文/文章".

name: baoyu-post-to-x
author: JimLiu
description: Posts content and articles to X (Twitter). Supports regular posts with images/videos and X Articles (long-form Markdown). Uses real Chrome with CDP to bypass anti-automation. Use when user asks to "post to X", "tweet", "publish to Twitter", or "share on X".

name: baoyu-slide-deck
author: JimLiu
description: Generates professional slide deck images from content. Creates outlines with style instructions, then generates individual slide images. Use when user asks to "create slides", "make a presentation", "generate deck", "slide deck", or "PPT".

name: baoyu-url-to-markdown
author: JimLiu
description: Fetch any URL and convert to markdown using Chrome CDP. Supports two modes - auto-capture on page load, or wait for user signal (for pages requiring login). Use when user wants to save a webpage as markdown.

name: baoyu-xhs-images
author: JimLiu
description: Generates Xiaohongshu (Little Red Book) infographic series with 10 visual styles and 8 layouts. Breaks content into 1-10 cartoon-style images optimized for XHS engagement. Use when user mentions "小红书图片", "XHS images", "RedNote infographics", "小红书种草", or wants social media infographics for Chinese platforms.
_original_description: Generates Xiaohongshu (Little Red Book) infographic series with 9 visual styles and 6 layouts. Breaks content into 1-10 cartoon-style images optimized for XHS engagement. Use when user mentions "小红书图片", "XHS images", "RedNote infographics", "小红书种草", or wants social media infographics for Chinese platforms.

name: release-skills
author: JimLiu
description: Universal release workflow. Auto-detects version files and changelogs. Supports Node.js, Python, Rust, Claude Plugin, and generic projects. Use when user says "release", "发布", "new version", "bump version", "push", "推送".

name: doctor
author: JordanGunn
description: Diagnoses software failures by combining deterministic evidence gathering with agent judgment. Models failures as medical cases. Idempotent — run repeatedly until confident diagnosis, then generate schema-based treatment.

name: md-merge
author: JordanGunn
description: Merges markdown chunks back into a single document, reversing the split operation with integrity checks.

name: md-review
author: JordanGunn
description: Agent review for markdown quality, clarity, and structural integrity. Leverages deterministic lint output as input for subjective assessment.

name: md-split
author: JordanGunn
description: Splits a Markdown file by H2 headings into numbered documents and generates an index file.

name: plan-create
author: JordanGunn
description: Compile `.plan/active.yaml` into a schema-validated active plan directory under `.plan/active/`.

name: plan-discuss
author: JordanGunn
description: Shape and stabilize plan intent idempotently into `.plan/active.yaml` until `plan-create` is invoked.

name: plan-exec
author: JordanGunn
description: Execute tasks in the active plan under `.plan/active/`. Writes concrete Output and Handoff for each task and archives the plan once terminal.

name: prompt-compile
author: JordanGunn
description: Compile the YAML artifact into PROMPT.md with deterministic structure. A final agent pass polishes for fluidity, conciseness, and correctness.

name: prompt-exec
author: JordanGunn
description: Execute the forged prompt exactly as written. Requires explicit consent and a ready artifact. Deletes artifact after successful execution.

name: prompt-forge
author: JordanGunn
description: Shape, refine, and stabilize human intent into a canonical prompt artifact. Iteratively clarifies ambiguity until user confirms readiness.

name: sniff-abusers
author: JordanGunn
description: Detect object-oriented abusers smells (Switch Statements) using deterministic heuristics and append findings to `.sniff/findings.jsonl`.

name: sniff-bloaters
author: JordanGunn
description: Detect bloaters smells (Long Method, Large Class, Long Parameter List) using deterministic heuristics and append findings to `.sniff/findings.jsonl`.

name: sniff-couplers
author: JordanGunn
description: Detect couplers smells (Message Chains, Feature Envy) using deterministic heuristics and append findings to `.sniff/findings.jsonl`.

name: sniff-locate
author: JordanGunn
description: List findings in `.sniff/findings.jsonl`, validate anchors, reanchor stale findings when code shifts, and regenerate `.sniff/index.json`.

name: sniff-preventers
author: JordanGunn
description: Detect change preventers smells (Shotgun Surgery) using deterministic heuristics and append findings to `.sniff/findings.jsonl`.

name: task-close
author: JordanGunn
description: Close a task by setting state to closed, recording close_reason and closed_at. Recomputes intent hash and clears `.tasks/.active` if it pointed to this task.

name: task-create
author: JordanGunn
description: Create a new task file in `.tasks/<id>.md` from template. Sets timestamps, computes initial intent hash, and optionally auto-selects the task.
